title: tf.keras.losses.SparseCategoricalCrossentropy  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Computes the crossentropy loss between the labels and predictions.
Inherits From:Loss
Use this crossentropy loss function when there are two or more label
classes.  We expect labels to be provided as integers. If you want to
provide labels usingone-hotrepresentation, please useCategoricalCrossentropyloss.  There should be# classesfloating point
values per feature fory_predand a single floating point value per
feature fory_true.
